title: Managing Workloads — Managing rollouts
text:
You can use
kubectl rollout
to manage a
progressive update of an existing application.
For example:
kubectl apply -f my-deployment.yaml
# wait for rollout to finish
kubectl rollout status deployment/my-deployment --timeout 10m
# 10 minute timeout
or
kubectl apply -f backing-stateful-component.yaml
# don't wait for rollout to finish, just check the status
kubectl rollout status statefulsets/backing-stateful-component --watch
=
false
You can also pause, resume or cancel a rollout.
Visit
kubectl rollout
to learn more.
